parsed_artifacts.content: {"ip":"timer","packet_id":"rtl_gate_evidence_closure","todo_plan_sha256":"53834821b27363b8d16e5991dc812b9380099860db84ca19bd61cb5db03fa76e","edits":["Added live irq_q signal flow from timer_core to timer_regs so function_model irq_q evidence is present in owner RTL without changing the external irq pulse contract.","Added LOAD value next-state helper in timer_regs to expose the LOAD.value field as live write datapath evidence.","Preserved SSOT top module ports, manifest child hierarchy, named port maps, and nonconstant child-driven outputs."],"ssot_tbd_report":"none","pass_claimed":false}
